{
    "openapi": "3.0.0",
    "info": {
        "title": "HEMIS UNIVERSITY API",
        "description": "\nHEMIS Oliygoh tizimini boshqa axborot tizimlari bilan integratsiya qilish uchun API. So'rovlar uchun\nqaytadigan ma'lumotlar til parametri ```l``` berilmagan holatda <b>o'zbek</b> tilida qaytadi. Kerakli tildagi\nnatijalarni olish uchun mos til kodi so'rovga qo'shiladi, masalan: ```data/schedule-list?l=ru-RU```\nso'rovida ma'lumotlar rus tilida qaytadi. Til parametri uchun quyidagi qiymatlar mavjud:\n\n- uz-UZ (o'zbek lotin)\n- oz-UZ (o'zbek kirill)\n- ru-RU (ruscha)\n- en-US (inglizcha)\n\nBarcha sana, sana+vaqt toifasidagi qiymatlar UTC timestamp formatida beriladi.\n\nHEMIS UNIVERSITY API metodlari 4 guruhga bo'lingan:\n\n<h3>1. Backend API</h3>\n\nTizim ma'lumotlar bazasidagi ayrim ma'lumotlarni olish uchun metodlar.\nUshbu guruh metodlaridan foydalanish uchun admin boshqaruv panelidan olingan token headerga\n```Authorization: Bearer auth_token_from_backend_dashboard``` qatorini qo'shish orqali amalga oshiriladi.\n\nAdmin boshqaruv paneldan token olish uchun ixtiyoriy admin foydalanuvchiga ```API User``` nomli rol qo'shish\norqali amalga oshiriladi. [Token olish uchun qo'llanma](https://t.me/hemis_university/525)\n\nRo'yxatdagi obyektlar limiti ```limit``` parametrda ko'rsatilmagan holatda 20 tadan qaytadi. Ushbu parametr\nmaksimal 200 qiymatini oladi.\n\nBu guruh api metodlariga Rate Limitir (IP bo'yicha) so'rovlar soniga limit qo'yilgan. ```Limit bir sekund vaqtda\nmaksimum 10 ta so'rov``` yuborilishi mumkin.\n\nBu guruhdagi metodlarni frontend ilovalar orqali brauzerda ishlatish taqiqlangan va bunga ```CORS cheklovi``` qo'yilgan.\nYa'ni faqatgina backend client orqali so'rov yuborish mumkin va malumotlarni local bazada saqlab borish tavfsiya etiladi.\n\n<h3>2. Public API</h3>\n\nUshbu guruh metodlari ochiq turdagi ma'lumotlarni olish uchun mo'ljallangan, so'rov yuborishda token yoki autentifikatsiya talab qilinmaydi.\n\n<h3>3. Student API</h3>\n\nTalaba kabineti malumotlarini olish uchun API. Ushbu guruh metodlariga so'rovlar headerga\n```Authorization: Bearer jwt_token_from_student_login_api_or_student_api_token_from_oAuth_resources``` qatorini qo'shish orqali amalga oshiriladi.\nJWT token ```auth/login``` metodiga talabaning login parolini yuborish orqali olinadi yoki oAuth serverdan olingan talaba attributlari ichidagi student_api_token ishlatiladi.\n```auth/login``` metodiga Rate Limitir (IP va login bo'yicha) so'rovlar soniga limit qo'yilgan. Cheklov mos ravishda IP uchun 10 daqiqada va login uchun 60 daqiqada 10 ta failga ruxsat berilgan\n\nTokenning eskirish muddati - 2 kun. Talaba paroli yangilanganda berilgan tokenlar invalidatsiya qilinadi. Tokenni yangilash uchun\n```auth/refresh-token``` metodiga so'rov yuboriladi. Batafsil ```auth/login``` hamda ```auth/refresh-token``` metodlari\nbilan tanishib chiqing.\n\n<h3>4. Tutor API</h3>\n\nTutor kabineti funksiyalarini mobil ilova yoki tashqi xizmatlarga integratsiya qilish uchun mo'ljallangan guruh.\nSo'rovlar ```Authorization: Bearer tutor_jwt_token``` headeri orqali autentifikatsiya qilinadi. JWT tokenini\n```/ver1/tutor/auth/login``` metodiga tutor login/parolini yuborish orqali olish mumkin, tokenni yangilash uchun esa\n```/ver1/tutor/auth/refresh-token``` dan foydalaniladi. Guruhga kiruvchi barcha metodlar ```tutorBearerAuth```\nschema'si orqali himoyalangan bo'lib, jadval, kontrakt, talaba ma'lumotlarini firmaning tutor ilovalariga chiqarish\nuchun ishlatiladi.\n\n<h3>5. Fast API</h3>\n\nFast API HEMIS ma'lumotlaridan agregatsiya qilingan tezkor statistikani uchinchi tomon xizmatlariga yetkazib berish\nuchun ishlatiladi. Ushbu guruhdagi metodlar Fast API serveridan olingan ```token``` query parametri orqali\nautentifikatsiya qilinadi va jadval, reyting, davomat kabi ko'rsatkichlarni JSON formatida tezkor qaytaradi.\n\n\n<h3>oAuth server</h3>\n\nHEMIS Universitet tizimida oAuth server moduli yaratilgan. Buning yordamida foydalanuvchilar\nHEMIS Universitet tizimidagi talaba yoki hodim akkaunti yordamida boshqa tizimlarda registratsiya\nyoki avtorizatsiya qilishlari mumkin. Talaba attributlarida keluvchi student_api_token JWT tokeni Student API guruhidagi metodlar uchun ham ishlatiladi.\noAuth modul oAuth2 standartida ishlaydi.\n\nBatafsil va namunaviy web ilova bilan [ushbu sahifada](https://github.com/homidjonov/hemis-oauth) tanishing.\n\n",
        "version": "1.3"
    },
    "servers": [
        {
            "url": "https://student.sies.uz/rest/",
            "description": "Local Server"
        },
        {
            "url": "https://student.hemis.uz/rest/",
            "description": "Test Server"
        }
    ],
    "paths": {
        "/v1/account/me": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talabaning shaxsiy va akademik ma'lumotlari",
                "operationId": "d39bbbaff4f54d8149e5a6d16a00df51",
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Student"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/account/update": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba ma'lumotlarini yangilash",
                "description": "Talabaning kontaktlari va parolini yangilash",
                "operationId": "369c849ca095f4901126ad0e75c94ea2",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "phone": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "+998 90 123-45-67"
                                    },
                                    "email": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "student.name@university.uz"
                                    },
                                    "change_contacts": {
                                        "type": "boolean",
                                        "example": true
                                    },
                                    "password": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "DD7777777"
                                    },
                                    "confirmation": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "DD7777777"
                                    },
                                    "change_password": {
                                        "type": "boolean",
                                        "example": true
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/account/refresh": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba ayrim malumotlarini tashqi xizmatlardan yangilash",
                "description": "Talabaning kambag'allik darajasini yangilash",
                "operationId": "a77a0158211140652767b721bce1b5a0",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Yangilash turi (masalan: poverty)",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "poverty"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        },
                                                        "povertyLevel": {
                                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Classifier"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/ai/chat": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "AI chatbot bilan suhbat",
                "description": "Keyword asosida talabaning ma'lumotlarini AI orqali tahlil qilib javob qaytaradi.\n     *                  Backend talabaning ma'lumotlarini o'zi DB dan yig'adi va AI ga yuboradi.\n     *                  Mavjud keywordlar: summary, grades, attendance, subjects, timetable, contract, courses, plagiarism, diploma, roadmap, conversation.\n     *                  Diqqat: Suhbat jarayoni kuniga maksimal 15 ta keshlanmagan so'rov bilan cheklangan.",
                "operationId": "d918674b66d1d06143875c6f027128b5",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "keyword"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "keyword": {
                                        "description": "Qaysi turdagi ma'lumot tahlili kerak",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "enum": [
                                            "summary",
                                            "grades",
                                            "attendance",
                                            "subjects",
                                            "timetable",
                                            "contract",
                                            "courses",
                                            "plagiarism",
                                            "diploma",
                                            "roadmap",
                                            "conversation"
                                        ],
                                        "example": "conversation"
                                    },
                                    "text": {
                                        "description": "Plagiat (keyword='plagiarism') uchun tekshiriladigan matn",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Ushbu maqola mening referatim..."
                                    },
                                    "question": {
                                        "description": "Diplom (keyword='diploma') uchun chatbot savoli",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Diplomimni qanday saqlayman?"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "AI javob muvaffaqiyatli qaytdi",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "data": {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "keyword": {
                                                    "type": "string",
                                                    "example": "grades"
                                                },
                                                "response": {
                                                    "type": "string",
                                                    "example": "Sizning joriy semestr baholaringiz tahlili..."
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Noto'g'ri keyword",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Unauthorized",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "503": {
                        "description": "AI service mavjud emas",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/ai/keywords": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Mavjud AI keyword lar ro'yxati",
                "description": "Frontend uchun qo'llab-quvvatlanadigan keywordlar ro'yxatini qaytaradi",
                "operationId": "0d7e38a2b091fb278fa6276563e8a84c",
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "data": {
                                            "type": "array",
                                            "items": {
                                                "type": "string"
                                            },
                                            "example": [
                                                "summary",
                                                "grades",
                                                "attendance",
                                                "subjects",
                                                "timetable",
                                                "contract",
                                                "courses",
                                                "plagiarism",
                                                "diploma",
                                                "roadmap",
                                                "conversation"
                                            ]
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Unauthorized",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/ai/history": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "AI chatbot suhbat tarixi",
                "description": "Talabaning so'nggi 50 ta conversation (erkin suhbat) xabarlarini qaytaradi.",
                "operationId": "6130901376236eed3706831466f69535",
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "data": {
                                            "type": "array",
                                            "items": {
                                                "properties": {
                                                    "id": {
                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                        "example": 10
                                                    },
                                                    "role": {
                                                        "type": "string",
                                                        "example": "user"
                                                    },
                                                    "message": {
                                                        "type": "string",
                                                        "example": "Qachon baholar e'lon qilinadi?"
                                                    },
                                                    "created_at": {
                                                        "type": "string",
                                                        "example": "2026-04-07 13:00:00"
                                                    }
                                                },
                                                "type": "object"
                                            }
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Unauthorized",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "5. Fast API"
                ],
                "summary": "Chatting",
                "operationId": "chatting__post",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "token",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Token",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Question"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Successful Response",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "422": {
                        "description": "Validation Error",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },

        "/history": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "5. Fast API"
                ],
                "summary": "Get Info",
                "description": "GET /history",
                "operationId": "get_info_history_get",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "offset",
                        "in": "query",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 0
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "size",
                        "in": "query",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 25
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "token",
                        "in": "query",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Successful Response",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "422": {
                        "description": "Validation Error",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            "delete": {
                "tags": [
                    "5. Fast API"
                ],
                "summary": "Delete Chat",
                "description": "DELETE /history",
                "operationId": "delete_chat_history_delete",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "token",
                        "in": "query",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {

        "/v1/auth/login": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba login paroli orqali avtorizatsiya qilish",
                "description": "Ushbu so'rov natijasida boshqa metodlarga avtorizatsiya qilish uchun JWT token qaytariladi. Bundan tashqari ayni ushbu tokenni yangilash uchun ```auth/refresh-token``` metodiga yuboriladigan cookie qaytariladi.",
                "operationId": "53bc635653cda5cdc03f0c419ecb5db0",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/AuthRequest"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "headers": {
                            "Set-Cookie": {
                                "description": "Refresh token",
                                "schema": {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "example": "refresh-token=LsRxIxLl-RgxwO-D9Za5Mw3lzXNYJcbTKJKw5MsECP2D9uiKejaya7EzbAkbUmX2mlUlzax_Zs9mOm1piD4QTsZ28A49s4475BkAJL9X; path=/v1/auth/refresh-token; samesite=none; secure; HttpOnly"
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "token": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "uap4X5Bd7078lxIFvxAflcGAa5D95iSSZkNjg3XFrE2EBRBlbj"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "/v1/auth/refresh-token": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "JWT tokenni yangilash",
                "description": "Tokenni yangilash uchun ```auth/login``` metodida qaytgan ```refresh-token``` nomli cookie yuboriladi",
                "operationId": "7717c98cdb3b0942dd0632201ae855cf",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "X-Refresh-Token",
                        "in": "header",
                        "description": "So'rov uchun yuboriladigan refresh token",
                        "required": true,
                        "example": "LsRxIxLl-RgxwO-D9Za5Mw3lzXNYJcbTKJKw5MsECP2D9uiKejaya7EzbAkbUmX2mlUlzax_Zs9mOm1piD4QTsZ28A49s4475BkAJL9X-IQZ7nm70D15AKZxnZ4QxkAUWJsEGinO7pq0NS41EKw8qwuiMOTWuFJ3MduYUCG4YMGVkadkhoa5vP0GCEDsPWAm0KdME5KCPa; path=/v1/auth/refresh-token; samesite=none; secure; HttpOnly"
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "token": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "uap4X5Bd7078lxIFvxAflcGAa5D95iSSZkNjg3XFrE2EBRBlbj"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Bad request",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },

        "/v1/data/student-grade-list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Kunlik baholar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "71bf85e460b6224ce6b19ec1f7d634ad",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Page number for pagination - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Items limit - [1, ..., 200]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_faculty",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by faculty.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_group",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by group.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by semester.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationYear.code - [2020,2021,2022,2023 ...], default current education year",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_subject",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by subject.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by employee.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_student",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_lesson_pair",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by lessonPair.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_training_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by trainingType.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "lesson_date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which lesson_date >= than given timestamp - [1671711387, 1671711410 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "lesson_date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which lesson_date <= than given timestamp - [1671711387, 1671711410 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "type": "array",
                                                    "items": {
                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/StudentGrade"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "pagination": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Pagination"
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Akkreditatsiya baxolari ro'yxati",

                "parameters": [

                        "in": "query",

                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",

                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by semester.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationYear.code - [2020,2021,2022,2023 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_subject",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by subject.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_curriculum",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by curriculum.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by employee.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_student",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "student_id_number",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student ID number (HEMIS ID) - [301201101010 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "subject_code",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by subject.code",

                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student meta educationForm.code - [11,12,13 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "updated_at_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which updated_at >= than given timestamp - [1671711387, 1671711410 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "updated_at_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which updated_at <= than given timestamp - [1671711387, 1671711410 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "type": "array",
                                                    "items": {
                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/AcademicRecord"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "pagination": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Pagination"
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }

                "security": [

                        "name": "_education_year",

                    },

                    },

                ],
                "summary": "Kunlik davomad ro'yxati",

                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",

                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Items limit - [1, ..., 200]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_subject_schedule",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by subjectSchedule.id - [1,2 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationYear.code - [2022,2023 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by semester.code - [11,12 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_subject",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by subjectMeta.id - [1,2 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_training_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by trainingType.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_lesson_pair",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by lessonPair.code - [11,12,...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by employee.id - [1,2,...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_student",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student.id - [1,2,...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_group",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by group.id - [1,2,...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "lesson_date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which lesson_date >= than given timestamp - [1671711387, 1671711410 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "lesson_date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which lesson_date <= than given timestamp - [1671711387, 1671711410 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "student_pnfl",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student PNFL (passport_pin) - [12345678901234]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "attendance_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by attendance type: present (qatnashgan), absent_with_reason (sababli), absent_without_reason (sababsiz)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                                "present",
                                "absent_with_reason",
                                "absent_without_reason"
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ],

                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",

                                                            },

                                                                }
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]

        "/v1/data/contract-list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba kontraktlari ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "97db41768a933a016f4c0a5e1872de27",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Page number for pagination - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Items limit - [1, ..., 200]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationYear.code - [2022, 2023, ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_student",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student.id - [1, 2, 3, ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "search",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by student.student_id_number, student.first_name, student.second_name, student.third_name",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_contract_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by _data._contract_type - [\n     *      001 - Bazaviy shartnoma\n     *      002 - Tabaqalashtirilgan shartnoma\n     *      003 - Shartnoma (tavsiya bo'yicha)\n     *      004 - Shartnoma xorijiy\n     *      005 - Davlat granti\n     *     ]",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",

                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },

                                                    "type": "array",

                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/StudentDataContract"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "attributes": {
                                                                "description": "Key-Label pairs of attributes"
                                                            },
                                                            "pagination": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Pagination"
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
