        "/v1/data/student-absence-count": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talabaning joriy semestrdagi qoldirgan darslari soni",
                "operationId": "91b4e1ee98b012f8537f890f85d0057f",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "pnfl",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talabaning PNFL (pasport PIN) qiymati",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "12345678901234"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semestr kodi (majburiy emas). Berilmasa talabaning joriy semestri olinadi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2024-2025-1"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "student_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 1205
                                                        },
                                                        "student_id_number": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "JB2020458"
                                                        },
                                                        "full_name": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Aliyev Jasur Abdulla o'g'li"
                                                        },
                                                        "pnfl": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "12345678901234"
                                                        },
                                                        "education_year": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024-2025"
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024-2025-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "group_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 45
                                                        },
                                                        "group": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "20-11"
                                                        },
                                                        "absent_without_reason": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 5
                                                        },
                                                        "absent_with_reason": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 2
                                                        },
                                                        "total_absent": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 7
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "404": {
                        "description": "Not Found",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "Bearer": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/student-absence-count-list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talabalar bo'yicha joriy semestrda qoldirgan darslar statistikasi",
                "operationId": "a449fd83eaa1ceee21fa5ec86ae18503",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili kodi (masalan 2024-2025). Berilmasa joriy yil olinadi",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semestr boshlanish sanasi",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2025-09-01"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semestr tugash sanasi",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2025-12-30"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "faculty_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet ID",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "pnfl",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba PNFL qiymati",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "student_id_number",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ID raqami (qisman qidiruv)",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifadagi elementlar soni",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "items": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "student_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1502
                                                                    },
                                                                    "full_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Aliyev Jasur Abdulla o'g'li"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_id_number": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "JB2020458"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "pnfl": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "12345678901234"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_year": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2025-2026"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "semester": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2025-2026-1"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 45
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_sababli": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 2
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_sababsiz": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 5
                                                                    },
                                                                    "total_absences": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 7
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "totalCount": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 120
                                                                },
                                                                "pageSize": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "pageCount": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 6
                                                                },
                                                                "page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "Bearer": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/attendance-stat": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Davomad statistikasi",
                "operationId": "71daae43296e2a17d6b8a2d8dc671acb",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Page number for pagination - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Items limit - [1, ..., 200]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_by",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Group by - [group,department,university]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_group",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by group.id - [1, 2, 3, 4, ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_department",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by department.id - [1, 2, 3, 4, ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationType.code - [10, 11, 12, ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_form",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationForm.code - [10, 11, 12, ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by from date - [2023-05-02]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by to date - [2023-05-02]",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "type": "array",
                                                    "items": {
                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/AttendanceStat"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "pagination": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Pagination"
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

        "/v1/data/poll-list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "So'rovnomalar ro'yxati",
                "description": "Admin token orqali talaba uchun mavjud so'rovnomalar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "76db90d6491a2e29a944537212d8f130",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "student_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ID raqami, berilsa shu talabaga tegishli so'rovnomalar qaytariladi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_subject",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fan ID bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semestr kodi bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili kodi bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'qituvchi ID bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "items": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/PollUserSubject"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "pageSize": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "pageCount": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "totalCount": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/student-debtor-count": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Qarzdor talabalar soni (har bir talaba o'z joriy semestrida)",
                "operationId": "8604734698025d9c9542785c9d2eb607",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili (majburiy emas, berilmasa joriy yil)",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2024-2025"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "faculty_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet ID",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 7
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 45
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "total_students": {
                                                            "description": "Jami talabalar soni",
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 450
                                                        },
                                                        "debtor_students": {
                                                            "description": "Qarzdor talabalar soni",
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 45
                                                        },
                                                        "debtor_percentage": {
                                                            "description": "Qarzdorlar foizi",
                                                            "type": "number",
                                                            "example": 10
                                                        },
                                                        "education_year": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024-2025"
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024-2025-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "by_department": {
                                                            "description": "Fakultetlar bo'yicha",
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "department_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 7
                                                                    },
                                                                    "department_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Axborot texnologiyalari fakulteti"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "total_students": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 120
                                                                    },
                                                                    "debtor_students": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 15
                                                                    },
                                                                    "debtor_percentage": {
                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 12.5
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "Bearer": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/student-subject-debts": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talabaning fanlar bo'yicha qarzdorligi (PINFL orqali)",
                "description": "Talabaning joriy semestridagi fanlar bo'yicha qarz ma'lumotlarini qaytaradi",
                "operationId": "eb1154348777fdd23b04cd2ebc610329",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "pinfl",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba PINFL (JSHSHIR)",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "12345678901234"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Muvaffaqiyatli",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "data": {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "student": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 5021
                                                        },
                                                        "pinfl": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "12345678901234"
                                                        },
                                                        "full_name": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Aliyev Ali Vali o'g'li"
                                                        },
                                                        "student_id_number": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "20210001"
                                                        },
                                                        "group": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "101-guruh"
                                                        },
                                                        "department": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Axborot texnologiyalari"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                },
                                                "current_semester": {
                                                    "type": "string",
                                                    "example": "2024-2025-1"
                                                },
                                                "education_year": {
                                                    "type": "string",
                                                    "example": "2024-2025"
                                                },
                                                "debts": {
                                                    "type": "array",
                                                    "items": {
                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "subject_id": {
                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                "example": 123
                                                            },
                                                            "subject_name": {
                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                "example": "Matematika"
                                                            },
                                                            "subject_code": {
                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                "example": "MAT101"
                                                            },
                                                            "credit": {
                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                "example": 4
                                                            },
                                                            "total_point": {
                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                "example": 45.5,
                                                                "nullable": true
                                                            },
                                                            "grade": {
                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                "example": null,
                                                                "nullable": true
                                                            },
                                                            "semester": {
                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                "example": "2024-2025-1"
                                                            },
                                                            "exam_type": {
                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                "example": "Yakuniy nazorat",
                                                                "nullable": true
                                                            },
                                                            "status": {
                                                                "description": "Debt manbai: missing_record yoki current_midterm",
                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                "example": "current_midterm"
                                                            },
                                                            "required_point": {
                                                                "description": "Agar mavjud bo'lsa minimal talab etilgan ball",
                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                "example": 48,
                                                                "nullable": true
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                },
                                                "total_debts": {
                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                    "example": 2
                                                },
                                                "total_debt_credit": {
                                                    "type": "number",
                                                    "example": 8
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "404": {
                        "description": "Talaba topilmadi"
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Autentifikatsiya xatosi"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "Bearer": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/student-count-by-shift": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "O'qiyotgan talabalar soni va smena bo'yicha taqsimoti",
                "description": "O'qimoqda statusidagi barcha talabalar sonini va ularning ertalabki/kunduzi smena bo'yicha taqsimotini qaytaradi. Smena guruhning berilgan davrdagi dars jadvali asosida aniqlanadi (12:00 gacha va keyin boshlanadigan darslar soni solishtiriladi). Default: noyabr oyining 1-haftasi.",
                "operationId": "50673981574aed3d36b69a118cd462f7",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "start_date",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Boshlanish sanasi (YYYY-MM-DD formatda). Default: joriy yilning 1-noyabri",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2024-11-01"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "end_date",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Tugash sanasi (YYYY-MM-DD formatda). Default: joriy yilning 7-noyabri",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2024-11-07"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "shift_time",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Smena chegarasi vaqti (HH:MM formatda). Default: 12:00",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "12:00"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "code": {
                                            "type": "integer",
                                            "example": 0
                                        },
                                        "data": {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "total": {
                                                    "description": "Jami kunduzgi ta'limda o'qiyotgan talabalar soni",
                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                    "example": 5000
                                                },
                                                "morning_shift": {
                                                    "description": "Ertalabki smena (shift_time gacha)",
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 3000
                                                        },
                                                        "districts": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "code": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1726",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Sergeli tumani",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 500
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                },
                                                "afternoon_shift": {
                                                    "description": "Kunduzi smena (shift_time dan keyin)",
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 1900
                                                        },
                                                        "districts": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "code": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1727",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Chilonzor tumani",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 400
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                },
                                                "unknown_shift": {
                                                    "description": "Dars jadvali topilmagan guruhlar talabalari",
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 100
                                                        },
                                                        "districts": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "code": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1728",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Olmazor tumani",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 50
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        },
                                        "message": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "nullable": true
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Autentifikatsiya xatosi"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/student-stats": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Aktiv talabalar statistikasi (turli parametrlar bo'yicha)",
                "description": "Barcha aktiv (o'qiyotgan) talabalarni tanlangan parametr bo'yicha guruhlangan statistikasini qaytaradi. Default: education_form",
                "operationId": "d847edf4b103e2eec534f1e81bd3bf04",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_by",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruhlash parametri - [education_form (default), education_type, payment_form, level, gender, department]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili bo'yicha filter - [2021, 2022, 2023 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_department",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet bo'yicha filter - [1, 2, 3, 4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim turi bo'yicha filter - [11, 12, 13 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_form",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim shakli bo'yicha filter - [11, 12, 13 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_level",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Kurs bo'yicha filter - [11, 12, 13, 14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_specialty",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Mutaxassislik bo'yicha filter - [1, 2, 3, 4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_payment_form",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "To'lov shakli bo'yicha filter - [11, 12 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "group_by": {
                                                            "description": "Tanlangan guruhlash parametri",
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        },
                                                        "items": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/StudentEducationFormStatisticsItem"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "total": {
                                                            "description": "Jami talabalar soni",
                                                            "type": "integer"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/employee-stats": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Active employees statistics (grouped by various parameters)",
                "description": "Returns statistics of all active (working) employees grouped by the selected parameter. Default: employee_type",
                "operationId": "91b49dfd493d1151ecfe5fd1454a09f7",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_by",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Grouping parameter - [employee_type (default), department, position, gender]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Employee type filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_department",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Department (faculty) ID filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_position",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Position type filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee_status",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Employee status filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "pinfl_list",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "If true, includes PINFL list in response",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "group_by": {
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        },
                                                        "items": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "code": {
                                                                        "type": "string"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "percent": {
                                                                        "type": "number"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "total": {
                                                            "type": "integer"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/schedule-teachers": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tanlangan fanlar bo'yicha dars jadvali qo'yilgan o'qituvchilar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "6dcadf8a074faa8e039627a0b3961631",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Page number for pagination - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Items limit - [1, ..., 200]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_subject",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by subject.id - single ID or comma-separated [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "search",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Search by subject name (partial match, case-insensitive). Example: 'ingliz' will find all subjects containing 'ingliz' in their name",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by educationYear.code - [2020,2021,2022,2023 ...], default current education year",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by semester.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_group",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by group.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_training_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by trainingType.code - [11,12,13,14 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_employee",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by employee.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_faculty",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter by faculty.id - [1,2,3,4 ...]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "lesson_date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which lesson_date >= than given timestamp",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "lesson_date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Filter items which lesson_date <= than given timestamp",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "type": "array",
                                                    "items": {
                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ScheduleTeacher"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "pagination": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Pagination"
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/data/student-debt-stats": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "Akademik qarzdorlik va dars qoldirish statistikasi",
                "description": "type=1: Akademik qarzdorlik (total_point < 56 yoki grade < 3). type=2: Dars qoldirish (min_hours parametri bilan). Har ikkalasida list=0: umumiy statistika, list=1: talabalar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "8c1f5a855e3b26425dc20b1765e5ccf5",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "1 = akademik qarzdorlik (default), 2 = dars qoldirish",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "list",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "0 = umumiy statistika (default), 1 = talabalar ro'yxati",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_by",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruhlash parametri (list=0 uchun) - [education_form (default), education_type, payment_form, level, gender, department]",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "min_hours",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Minimal dars qoldirish soati (type=2 uchun, default 10). Masalan 10 bersa - 10 va undan ko'p soat qoldirgan talabalarni qaytaradi",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili bo'yicha filter. Bermasa joriy yil olinadi",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_department",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim turi bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_form",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim shakli bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_level",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Kurs bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_specialty",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Mutaxassislik bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_payment_form",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "To'lov shakli bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh bo'yicha filter",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami (list=1 uchun)",
                        "required": false
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "limit",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifadagi yozuvlar soni (list=1 uchun, max 200)",
                        "required": false
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success"
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden - invalid credentials",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ForbiddenResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

            "get": {
                "tags": [

                "description": "Ta'lim turi va ta'lim shakli bo'yicha guruhlangan holda o'zlashtirish kesimida (dars para) dars qoldirgan talabalar soni yoki ularning ro'yxati qaytariladi. date parametrsiz joriy kun olinadi.",

                        "description": "Fakultet bo'yicha filter",

                        "required": false
                    },
