                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/sso/verify": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "1. Backend API"
                ],
                "summary": "SSO Tokenni tekshirish",
                "description": "Boshqa tizimlar ushbu endpoint orqali SSO tokenni tekshirishi mumkin. \n     *                  Bu endpoint autentifikatsiya talab qilmaydi.",
                "operationId": "8066d8a8c05683ec5c2920969045418d",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "token",
                                    "secret"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "token": {
                                        "description": "SSO token",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "eyJzdHVkZW50X2lkIjo..."
                                    },
                                    "secret": {
                                        "description": "Maxfiy kalit",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "DFgjg57GtjG6998..."
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": true
                                                        },
                                                        "student": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "student_id": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 12345
                                                                },
                                                                "pinfl": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "12345678901234"
                                                                },
                                                                "student_id_number": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "123456789012"
                                                                },
                                                                "first_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Ism"
                                                                },
                                                                "second_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Familiya"
                                                                },
                                                                "third_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Otasining ismi"
                                                                },
                                                                "email": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "student@example.com"
                                                                },
                                                                "phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998901234567"
                                                                },
                                                                "group": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "21-19"
                                                                },
                                                                "university_code": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "123"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Bad request",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": false
                                        },
                                        "error": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "Token muddati tugagan"
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },

                        "name": "year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili kodi (masalan, 2025). Ko'rsatilmasa barcha yillar.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {

                                    "allOf": [

                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"

                                        {
                                            "properties": {

                                                    "items": {
                                                        "properties": {
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "array",
                                                                "items": {
                                                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/StudentDataStipend"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "attributes": {
                                                                "description": "Key-Label pairs of attributes"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "type": "object"
                                                    }
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

        "/v1/student/message-list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba xabarlari ro'yxati",
                "description": "Talabaga kelgan va yuborilgan xabarlar ro'yxatini olish",
                "operationId": "147b934913982302ad4521634ff9f2ed",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "folder",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Xabarlar papkasi: inbox (kelgan), outbox (yuborilgan), draft (qoralama), trash (o'chirilgan)",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "default": "inbox",
                            "enum": [
                                "inbox",
                                "outbox",
                                "draft",
                                "trash"
                            ]
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "search",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qidiruv so'zi",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "includeFullMessage",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "true bo'lsa to'liq xabar matni qaytariladi, aks holda qisqa preview",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "boolean",
                            "default": false
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Bir sahifadagi elementlar soni (1-100)",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "items": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/MessageItem"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "unread_count": {
                                                            "type": "integer"
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "total_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "page_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "current_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "per_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/student/message-view": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Xabarni ko'rish",

                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }

                    }

                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []

        "/v1/student/message-send": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Xabar yuborish",
                "description": "Boshqa foydalanuvchiga xabar yuborish",
                "operationId": "8fd752336141f4c34727bc41b32ceaf1",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "recipients",
                                    "title",
                                    "message"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "recipients": {
                                        "description": "Qabul qiluvchilar ID lari ro'yxati",
                                        "type": "array",
                                        "items": {
                                            "type": "integer"
                                        },
                                        "example": [
                                            1,
                                            2,
                                            3
                                        ]
                                    },
                                    "saveAsDraft": {
                                        "description": "true bo'lsa xabar yuborilmaydi, draft sifatida saqlanadi",
                                        "type": "boolean",
                                        "example": false
                                    },
                                    "title": {
                                        "description": "Xabar mavzusi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Salom"
                                    },
                                    "message": {
                                        "description": "Xabar matni",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Assalomu alaykum!"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean"
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Xabar yuborish uchun kontaktlarni qidirish",

                    {
                        "name": "search",

                                                                "page_count": {

                                                                },

                                                                    "type": "integer"

        "/v1/student/survey": {
            "get": {

                "summary": "Talaba so'rovnomalari ro'yxati",

                "operationId": "d8da08b0b4eebfc0bfec7991a452e71f",

                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "in_progress": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "finished": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "stats": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "total_pending": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                },
                                                                "total_completed": {
                                                                    "type": "integer"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",

                                }
