                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/student/survey-start": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "So'rovnomani boshlash",
                "description": "So'rovnomani boshlash yoki davom ettirish. Savollar ro'yxatini qaytaradi.",
                "operationId": "d7f33b16b7200cbd0f2444a7f3932ba6",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "id"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "id": {
                                        "description": "Quiz Rule ID",
                                        "type": "integer"
                                    },
                                    "lang": {
                                        "description": "Til kodi (UZ, RU, EN)",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "UZ"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "quiz_rule_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer"
                                                        },
                                                        "questions": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "quiz_info": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/student/survey-answer": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "Savolga javob berish",
                "description": "So'rovnoma savoliga javob yuborish. Savol turiga qarab javob formati:\n- **radio**: bitta variant string sifatida\n- **checkbox**: bir nechta variant array yoki object sifatida\n- **input**: matn string sifatida",
                "operationId": "611420288824d690d2fc6426d973bfca",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "question_id",
                                    "answer"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "question_id": {
                                        "description": "Savol ID si",
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "example": 20087
                                    },
                                    "button_type": {
                                        "description": "Savol turi (radio, checkbox, input)",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "enum": [
                                            "radio",
                                            "checkbox",
                                            "input"
                                        ],
                                        "example": "radio"
                                    },
                                    "answer": {
                                        "oneOf": [
                                            {
                                                "description": "radio/input uchun",
                                                "type": "string",
                                                "example": "HEMIS tizimi – qulay va funksional"
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "description": "checkbox uchun object",
                                                "type": "object",
                                                "example": [
                                                    "kompyuter",
                                                    "printer",
                                                    "proyektor"
                                                ],
                                                "additionalProperties": {
                                                    "type": "string"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "description": "checkbox uchun array",
                                                "type": "array",
                                                "items": {
                                                    "type": "string"
                                                },
                                                "example": [
                                                    "kompyuter",
                                                    "printer",
                                                    "proyektor"
                                                ]
                                            }
                                        ]
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean"
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/student/survey-finish": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "So'rovnomani yakunlash",
                "description": "So'rovnomani yakunlash. Yakunlangandan keyin javoblarni o'zgartirib bo'lmaydi.",
                "operationId": "1ac665dfc0bda32ab59018a91578882b",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "quiz_rule_id"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "quiz_rule_id": {
                                        "description": "Quiz Rule ID",
                                        "type": "integer"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean"
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/student/qr-attendance": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "3. Student API"
                ],
                "summary": "QR kod orqali davomatni belgilash",
                "description": "Talaba mobil ilova orqali QR kodni skaner qilib, davomatga belgilanadi",
                "operationId": "170e733d1b9061ee91b458e64c4d8bef",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "token": {
                                        "description": "QR koddagi token",
                                        "type": "string"
                                    },
                                    "code": {
                                        "description": "QR koddagi rotating kod (har 5 sekundda yangilanadi)",
                                        "type": "string"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean"
                                        },
                                        "message": {
                                            "type": "string"
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Bad Request",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "bearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/attendance/report": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Davomat hisoboti",
                "operationId": "ec1af8b5471553785a5a101163cffb7f",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (ixtiyoriy). Berilmasa tutorning barcha guruhlariga qo'llanadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi (masalan 2023-2024-1). Berilmasa joriy semestr olinadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "subject_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fan identifikatori. Berilsa faqat shu fan bo'yicha davomat qaytadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1205
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "student_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba identifikatori. Berilsa faqat shu talaba bo'yicha davomat qaytadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 5021
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "attendance": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1501
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                                "example": 5021
                                                                            },
                                                                            "full_name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "student_id_number": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "20210001"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Matematika"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "lesson_date": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-09-05"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "attendance_type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Davomat"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "reason": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Kasallik varaqasi mavjud",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "group_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 36
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 42
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/attendance/by-subject": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Fanlar bo'yicha davomat (har bir dars uchun batafsil ma'lumot)",
                "operationId": "cbe4959f29e2446f94808be4891d46a5",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (ixtiyoriy). Berilmasa tutorning barcha guruhlariga tegishli ma'lumotlar qaytadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi (ixtiyoriy). Berilmasa har bir guruhning joriy semestri bo'yicha ma'lumot qaytadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili (ixtiyoriy)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2025"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "students": {
                                                            "description": "Talabalar ro'yxati",
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "student_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 5021
                                                                    },
                                                                    "full_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_id_number": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20210001"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 36
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "subjects": {
                                                            "description": "Fanlar ro'yxati",
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "curriculum_subject_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1205
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 450
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Matematika"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "attendance_records": {
                                                            "description": "Har bir dars uchun davomat yozuvlari (talaba, dars sanasi, davomat holati)",
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "description": "Davomat yozuvi ID",
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 15432
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 5021
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_id_number": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20210001"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 450
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Matematika"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "lesson_date": {
                                                                        "description": "Dars sanasi",
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-09-15"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "start_time": {
                                                                        "description": "Dars boshlanish vaqti",
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "09:00"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_on": {
                                                                        "description": "Kechikish (1 - kechikdi, 0 - kechikish yo'q)",
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_off": {
                                                                        "description": "Kelmaslik (1 - kelmadi, 0 - keldi)",
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 0
                                                                    },
                                                                    "training_type": {
                                                                        "description": "Mashg'ulot turi",
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Ma'ruza"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 36
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "group_id": {
                                                            "description": "Agar bitta guruh so'ralgan bo'lsa group_id qaytadi",
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 36,
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        },
                                                        "group_ids": {
                                                            "description": "Barcha guruhlar ro'yxati",
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "integer"
                                                            },
                                                            "example": [
                                                                36,
                                                                37
                                                            ]
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "description": "Agar barcha guruhlar bir xil semestrda bo'lsa semester kodi qaytadi",
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024-1",
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        },
                                                        "group_semesters": {
                                                            "description": "Har bir guruhning semestri",
                                                            "type": "object",
                                                            "example": {
                                                                "36": "2023-2024-1",
                                                                "37": "2023-2024-1"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "education_year": {
                                                            "description": "Agar barcha semestrlar bir xil o'quv yilida bo'lsa education_year qaytadi",
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024",
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/attendance/statistic": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Statistik davomat",
                "operationId": "f0f26288b2c8f7e0f771b02b57b7878d",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (ixtiyoriy). Berilmasa tutorning barcha guruhlariga qo'llanadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi. Berilmasa joriy semestr olinadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "subject_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fan identifikatori (ixtiyoriy)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1205
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "summary": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "total_lessons": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 120
                                                                },
                                                                "present": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 95
                                                                },
                                                                "absent_without_reason": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 15
                                                                },
                                                                "absent_with_reason": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 10
                                                                },
                                                                "present_percent": {
                                                                    "type": "number",
                                                                    "example": 79.1
                                                                },
                                                                "absent_without_reason_percent": {
                                                                    "type": "number",
                                                                    "example": 12.5
                                                                },
                                                                "absent_with_reason_percent": {
                                                                    "type": "number",
                                                                    "example": 8.4
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "students": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "student_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 5021
                                                                    },
                                                                    "full_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_id_number": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20210001"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "present_count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 24
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_without_reason_count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 2
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_with_reason_count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1
                                                                    },
                                                                    "total_lessons": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 27
                                                                    },
                                                                    "present_percent": {
                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 88.89
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_without_reason_percent": {
                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 7.41
                                                                    },
                                                                    "absent_with_reason_percent": {
                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 3.7
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "group_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 36
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "subject_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 1205,
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/auth/login": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tutor login va parol orqali avtorizatsiya qilish",
                "description": "Ushbu so'rov natijasida JWT token va refresh_token qaytariladi. Tokenni yangilash uchun refresh_token ni ```auth/refresh-token``` metodiga request body orqali yuboring.",
                "operationId": "b11e296b190481d9c43793756370d4f9",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "$ref": "#/components/schemas/TutorAuthRequest"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "token": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1Qi..."
                                                        },
                                                        "refresh_token": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "LsRxIxLl-RgxwO-D9Za5Mw3lzXN..."
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Forbidden",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/auth/refresh-token": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "JWT tokenni yangilash",
                "description": "Tokenni yangilash uchun ```auth/login``` yoki avvalgi ```auth/refresh-token``` metodida qaytgan ```refresh_token``` ni request body orqali yuboring.",
                "operationId": "b2927a7bd996ba2eaa93abc1117942fd",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "refresh_token": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "LsRxIxLl-RgxwO-D9Za5Mw3lzXN..."
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "token": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1Qi..."
                                                        },
                                                        "refresh_token": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "NewRxIxLl-RgxwO-ABc..."
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Bad request",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/auth/logout": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tizimdan chiqish",
                "description": "Barcha tokenlarni bekor qilish va tizimdan chiqish",
                "operationId": "801e8fde610b21a0ada644bbcbdd889a",
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",

                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "data": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "format": "string",
                                                            "example": "Tizimdan muvaffaqiyatli chiqdingiz"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "401": {
                        "description": "Unauthorized",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/contract/list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Kontraktlar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "a17cc31b343c7aef46f85ac0e6b78cc2",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (filtrlash uchun). Berilmasa barcha guruhlar",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 25
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili kodi, masalan 2024-2025",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2024-2025"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "status",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Kontrakt statusi kodi (masalan ACTIVE)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "ACTIVE"
                        }
                    }
                ],

                                                                        "example": "CN-2024/001"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "contract_date": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-08-15"

                                                                        "example": "20-11"

                                                                                "example": 5021

                                                                                "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                            },

                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "20210001"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "contract_type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "To'lov-kontrakt"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "contract_status": {
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "number",

                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 12000000
                                                                    },
                                                                    "debt_summa": {
                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 6000000

                                                            }

                                                            "example": "2024-2025"
                                                        },
                                                        "count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 10
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                                                            "type": "array",

                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 501
                                                                    },
                                                                    "contract_number": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "CN-2024/001"
                                                                    },

                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                                "example": 5021
                                                                            },

                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Dilshod Karimov"
                                                                            },

                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "20210002"

                                                                                "example": "+998901112266"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },

                                                                        "type": "number",

                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 15000000
                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "example": 3000000
                                                                    },

                                            "type": "object"
                                        }

                            }

                    }
