        "/ver1/tutor/grade/rating": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Reyting qaydnomasi",
                "operationId": "86cccbddd875543ecc84208edb0b7b16",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili (majburiy)",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2024"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (majburiy emas, ko'rsatilmasa tutorning barcha guruhlari)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi (masalan 2023-2024-1)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "subject_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fan identifikatori",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1205
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 1,
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifadagi yozuvlar soni (max 100)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 20,
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "ratings": {
                                                            "description": "Talabalar ro'yxati, har birida fanlar mavjud",
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "student": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                                "example": 5021
                                                                            },
                                                                            "full_name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "student_id_number": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "20210001"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                                "example": 36
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "221-19"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subjects": {
                                                                        "description": "Talabaning fanlari",
                                                                        "type": "array",
                                                                        "items": {
                                                                            "properties": {
                                                                                "id": {
                                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                                    "example": 1501
                                                                                },
                                                                                "subject": {
                                                                                    "properties": {
                                                                                        "id": {
                                                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                                                            "example": 1205
                                                                                        },
                                                                                        "name": {
                                                                                            "type": "string",
                                                                                            "example": "Matematika"
                                                                                        }
                                                                                    },
                                                                                    "type": "object"
                                                                                },
                                                                                "grade": {
                                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                                    "example": "A"
                                                                                },
                                                                                "total_point": {
                                                                                    "type": "number",
                                                                                    "example": 87
                                                                                },
                                                                                "credit": {
                                                                                    "type": "number",
                                                                                    "example": 4
                                                                                }
                                                                            },
                                                                            "type": "object"
                                                                        }
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "group_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 36,
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        },
                                                        "group_semesters": {
                                                            "type": "object",
                                                            "example": {
                                                                "36": "2023-2024-1",
                                                                "38": "2023-2024-2"
                                                            },
                                                            "additionalProperties": {
                                                                "type": "string"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "group_ids": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "integer"
                                                            },
                                                            "example": [
                                                                36,
                                                                38
                                                            ]
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "education_year": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024"
                                                        },
                                                        "subject_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 1205,
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "current_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "per_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "total_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 150
                                                                },
                                                                "total_pages": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 8
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                            "example": 36

                        "in": "query",

                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "13"

                    },
                    {
                        "name": "curriculum",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv reja ID (ixtiyoriy)",

                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 100
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "subject_id",
                        "in": "query",

                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1205
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {

                        "description": "Success",

                                                                            },

                                                                        },

                                                                    },

                                                                        "example": "2024"
                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "string",

                                                        },

                                        }
                                    ]
                                }

                                                                            "full_name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Aliyev Ali"
                                                                            },

                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "20210001"

                                                                    },

                                                                        "example": "2023-2024"
                                                                    },

                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },

                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 36,
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        },
                                                        "group_ids": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "integer"
                                                            },
                                                            "example": [
                                                                36,
                                                                37,
                                                                38
                                                            ]
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024-1",
                                                            "nullable": true
                                                        },

                                                            "example": "2023-2024",

                                                        },

                                                            "example": 25
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }

                    }
                ]
            }
        },

        "/ver1/tutor/message/list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Mening xabarlarim ro'yxati",
                "description": "Tyutorning barcha xabarlarini qaytaradi. Kiruvchi (inbox), chiquvchi (outbox) va qoralama (draft) xabarlarni olish mumkin.",
                "operationId": "20d89cbb231b2fe24b0ba501aab7e544",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Xabar turi: inbox (kiruvchi), outbox (chiquvchi), draft (qoralama), trash (o'chirilganlar)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                                "inbox",
                                "outbox",
                                "draft",
                                "trash"
                            ],
                            "example": "inbox"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifadagi elementlar soni (max 100)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "search",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Xabar sarlavhasi yoki matni bo'yicha qidirish",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "Salom"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "messages": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 123
                                                                    },
                                                                    "title": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Talaba haqida ma'lumot"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "message": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Xabar matni..."
                                                                    },
                                                                    "sender": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                                "example": 5
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Admin Adminov"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "recipient": {
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "opened": {
                                                                        "type": "boolean",
                                                                        "example": false
                                                                    },
                                                                    "starred": {
                                                                        "type": "boolean",
                                                                        "example": false
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "inbox"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "created_at": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-11-25 10:30:00"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "opened_at": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-11-25 11:00:00",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "current_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "per_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "total_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 45
                                                                },
                                                                "total_pages": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 3
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "counters": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "inbox": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 10
                                                                },
                                                                "outbox": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 5
                                                                },
                                                                "draft": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 2
                                                                },
                                                                "trash": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 3
                                                                },
                                                                "unread_inbox": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 3
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                    {
                        "name": "id",
                        "in": "query",

                "responses": {

                        "description": "Success",

                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {

                                                        "id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 123
                                                        },
                                                        "title": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Talaba haqida ma'lumot"
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Xabar matni..."
                                                        },
                                                        "sender": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "recipients": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "files": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "type": "string"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "opened": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": false
                                                        },
                                                        "starred": {

                                                        },

                                                        },

                                                    "type": "object"

                                            "type": "object"
                                        }

        "/ver1/tutor/message/send": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Xabar yuborish",
                "description": "Yangi xabar yuborish yoki qoralama saqlash",
                "operationId": "88d3268e572e859438857a8ace0f581c",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "title",
                                    "message",
                                    "recipients"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "title": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Talaba haqida"
                                    },
                                    "message": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Xabar matni batafsil..."
                                    },
                                    "recipients": {
                                        "description": "Qabul qiluvchilar ID ro'yxati (Contact ID)",
                                        "type": "array",
                                        "items": {
                                            "type": "integer",
                                            "example": 5
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "save_as_draft": {
                                        "description": "Qoralama sifatida saqlash",
                                        "type": "boolean",
                                        "example": false
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Xabar muvaffaqiyatli yuborildi yoki saqlandi",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": true
                                                        },
                                                        "message_id": {
                                                            "description": "Message item ID (view endpointi uchun ishlatiladi)",
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 123
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Xabar muvaffaqiyatli yuborildi"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Validatsiya xatosi",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "$ref": "#/components/schemas/BadResponse"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/message/mark-as-read": {
            "post": {

                ],

        "/ver1/tutor/message/recipients": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Qabul qiluvchilar ro'yxati (xodimlar va talabalar)",
                "description": "Xabar yuborish uchun qabul qiluvchilarni qidirish. Xodimlar va talabalarni qaytaradi.",
                "operationId": "4376990a0ee7f3953aa96d4f47862215",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qabul qiluvchi turi: employee (xodimlar), student (talabalar), all (barchasi)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "enum": [
                                "employee",
                                "student",
                                "all"
                            ],
                            "example": "all"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "search",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qidirish matni (ism, guruh, fakultet)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "Aliyev"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (talabalarni guruh bo'yicha filtrlash)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 12
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "department_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet/Bo'lim ID (xodimlar yoki talabalarni fakultet bo'yicha filtrlash)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 7
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifadagi elementlar soni (max 100)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "recipients": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "description": "Contact ID",
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 5
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Aliyev Vali Karimovich"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "label": {
                                                                        "description": "Lavozim yoki guruh ma'lumoti",
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Dasturlash kafedrasi (Kafedra)"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": {
                                                                        "description": "admin (xodim) yoki student (talaba)",
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "admin"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "current_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "per_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "total_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 150
                                                                },
                                                                "total_pages": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 8
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

            "get": {
                "tags": [

                "summary": "Tyutor profili ma'lumotlari",

                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20-11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "department": {
                                                                        "type": "object",

                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_lang": {
                                                                        "type": "object",

                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_form": {

                                                                    }

                                                            }

                                                            "properties": {

                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 120
                                                                },
                                                                "active_students": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 108
                                                                },
                                                                "groups_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 4
                                                                },
                                                                "current_year": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "2024-2025 o'quv yili"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/profile/groups": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutorga tegishli guruhlar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "8bd5eaecfb8030c9226ef84c2212802e",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2024-2025"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semestr kodi (masalan 2024-2025-1). Berilmasa guruhning joriy semestri olinadi.",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2024-2025-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (aniq bitta guruhni qidirish)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "faculty_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet ID (guruhlarni fakultet bo'yicha filtrlash)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 7
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "groups": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 45
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20-11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "department": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Axborot texnologiyalari"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_lang": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "O'zbek"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Bakalavr"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_form": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Kunduzgi"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "curriculum": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "AT-20-11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "current_semester": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "code": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "2024-2025-1"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "1-semestr"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "education_year": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "2024-2025"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "start_date": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "2024-09-02"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "end_date": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "2025-01-15"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "students_count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 28
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "education_year": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024-2025"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

        "/ver1/tutor/reference/countries": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Davlatlar ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "f206dbee40b8b8468f5c0cd1c5ce4b11",
                "responses": {
                    "200": {

        "/ver1/tutor/schedule/lessons": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Dars jadvali",
                "operationId": "1655d30455eace48a814fe130a7a3041",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID. Berilmasa tutorning barcha guruhlari",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Har sahifada nechta",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "schedule": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 12005
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20-11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Matematika"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "training_type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Ma'ruza"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "lesson_pair": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "1-dars"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "start_time": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "08:30"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "end_time": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "09:50"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "auditorium": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "A-201"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "employee": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Aliyev Jasur"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "lesson_date": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-09-05"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "week_day": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 4
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "current_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "per_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "total_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 100
                                                                },
                                                                "total_pages": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 5
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "groups_count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 2
                                                        },
                                                        "group_semesters": {
                                                            "description": "Guruh ID -> qo'llangan semestr kodi",
                                                            "type": "object",
                                                            "example": {
                                                                "36": "2023-2024-1",
                                                                "38": "2023-2024-2"
                                                            },
                                                            "additionalProperties": {
                                                                "type": "string"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/schedule/filter-options": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Jadval filtrlari uchun ma'lumotlar",
                "operationId": "d1522056e9fac2368cb7525742d46387",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "faculty_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Fakultet ID",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 4
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim yili kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "expand",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qaytariladigan to'plamlar (masalan faculties,curriculums,...)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "faculties,curriculums,groups"
                        }
                    }

                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "faculties": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 7
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Axborot texnologiyalari fakulteti"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "curriculums": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 28
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "AT-20-11"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "educationYears": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-2025"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-2025 o'quv yili"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "semesters": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "code": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
