                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1-semestr"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "groups": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 45
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20-11"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "weeks": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 2045
                                                                    },
                                                                    "name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1-hafta"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "start_date": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-09-02"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "end_date": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-09-07"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [

                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

        "/ver1/tutor/schedule/exams": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Nazorat jadvali",
                "operationId": "625bb65ba6821b6a0b4f10e3992569ed",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "semester",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semester kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2023-2024-1"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Har sahifada nechta",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "exams": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 9105
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20-11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "subject": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Fizika"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "exam_type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Maxsus fan"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "exam_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1-nazorat"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "exam_date": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-12-01"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "start_time": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "10:00"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "finish_time": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "11:30"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "auditorium": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "B-105"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "current_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "per_page": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "total_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 50
                                                                },
                                                                "total_pages": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 3
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "semester": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "2024-2025-1"
                                                        },
                                                        "groups_count": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 2
                                                        },
                                                        "group_semesters": {
                                                            "description": "Guruh ID -> qo'llangan semestr kodi",
                                                            "type": "object",
                                                            "example": {
                                                                "36": "2024-2025-1",
                                                                "38": "2024-2025-2"
                                                            },
                                                            "additionalProperties": {
                                                                "type": "string"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                        }
                    },

        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/application": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutor uchun bitta ariza to'liq ma'lumoti",
                "operationId": "31e5c6c59669772d3b2e9206c8204a0a",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "id": {
                                            "type": "integer",
                                            "example": 1
                                        },
                                        "student_id": {
                                            "type": "integer",
                                            "example": 101
                                        },
                                        "student_name": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "Abdullayev Abdulla"
                                        },
                                        "student_group": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "504-20"
                                        },
                                        "name": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "2025-2026 yil arizasi"
                                        },
                                        "description": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "Barcha hujjatlar to'liq holatda"
                                        },
                                        "application_date": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "2026-04-03"
                                        },
                                        "_education_year": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "2025-2026"
                                        },
                                        "status": {
                                            "type": "integer",
                                            "example": 10
                                        },
                                        "status_label": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "Yangi"
                                        },
                                        "total_point": {
                                            "type": "number",
                                            "example": 25.5
                                        },
                                        "reject_comment": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "Fayl formati noto'g'ri",
                                            "nullable": true
                                        },
                                        "reject_date": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "2026-04-03 14:00:00",
                                            "nullable": true
                                        },
                                        "created_at": {
                                            "type": "string",
                                            "example": "2026-04-03 12:00:00"
                                        },
                                        "criteria": {
                                            "type": "array",
                                            "items": {
                                                "properties": {
                                                    "id": {
                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                        "example": 55
                                                    },
                                                    "criteria_id": {
                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                        "example": 12
                                                    },
                                                    "criteria_name": {
                                                        "type": "string",
                                                        "example": "Kitobxonlik tanlovida yutganligi"
                                                    },
                                                    "category_id": {
                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                        "example": 3
                                                    },
                                                    "direction_id": {
                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                        "example": 1
                                                    },
                                                    "point": {
                                                        "type": "number",
                                                        "example": 15
                                                    },
                                                    "basis_file": {
                                                        "description": "Fayl UUID va qolgan detallari massiv holatida",
                                                        "type": "object",
                                                        "nullable": true
                                                    },
                                                    "status": {
                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                        "example": 10
                                                    },
                                                    "status_label": {
                                                        "type": "string",
                                                        "example": "Yangi"
                                                    }
                                                },
                                                "type": "object"
                                            }
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "404": {
                        "description": "Not Found"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/criteria-approve": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Ariza mezonini tasdiqlash",
                "description": "Ariza ichidagi bitta mezonni tasdiqlaydi va ballni o'rnatadi. Ariza holati STATUS_CREATED (1) yoki STATUS_SENT (2) bo'lsa ham ishlaydi.",
                "operationId": "e3157d902f07e1fe13d0705e2178fdd8",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "id"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "id": {
                                        "description": "Application criteria yozuvi ID si (e_student_sad_application_criteria.id)",
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "example": 55
                                    },
                                    "point": {
                                        "description": "Tasdiqlangan ball. Faqat is_strict=false (qat'iy emas) kategoriyalar uchun qisman qiymat qabul qilinadi (0..max). Strict kategoriyalarda har doim mezonning to'liq balli qo'yiladi.",
                                        "type": "number",
                                        "format": "float",
                                        "example": 15
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Muvaffaqiyatli tasdiqlandi",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "total_point": {
                                            "description": "Ariza bo'yicha yangilangan jami ball",
                                            "type": "number",
                                            "example": 25.5
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "404": {
                        "description": "Mezon yozuvi topilmadi"
                    },
                    "403": {
                        "description": "Ushbu talabaga ruxsat yo'q"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/criteria-reject": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Ariza mezonini rad etish",
                "description": "Ariza ichidagi bitta mezonni rad etadi va uning ballini 0 ga tushiradi. Ariza holati STATUS_CREATED (1) yoki STATUS_SENT (2) bo'lsa ham ishlaydi.",
                "operationId": "698e1a0467192010ed135bd2d4fc92f4",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "id"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "id": {
                                        "description": "Application criteria yozuvi ID si (e_student_sad_application_criteria.id)",
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "example": 55
                                    },
                                    "comment": {
                                        "description": "Rad etish sababi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Fayl formati noto'g'ri"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Muvaffaqiyatli rad etildi",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "total_point": {
                                            "description": "Ariza bo'yicha yangilangan jami ball",
                                            "type": "number",
                                            "example": 10
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "404": {
                        "description": "Mezon yozuvi topilmadi"
                    },
                    "403": {
                        "description": "Ushbu talabaga ruxsat yo'q"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/application-approve": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Arizani to'liq tasdiqlash",
                "operationId": "6cb8517c4fbe206086ce71ce97bc8369",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success"
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/category-approve": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Kategoriya mezonlarini to'liq tasdiqlash",
                "description": "Berilgan ariza va kategoriya bo'yicha barcha mezonlarni bir requestda tasdiqlaydi. Agar mezonlarning ballarini o'zgartirish kerak bo'lsa, `scores` massivi orqali yuborish mumkin.",
                "operationId": "9d0d373360bb92af83290cad5d4ba91f",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "application_id",
                                    "category_id"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "application_id": {
                                        "description": "Ariza ID si",
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "example": 8
                                    },
                                    "category_id": {
                                        "description": "Kategoriya ID si (EStudentSadCategory.id — parent_id > 0 bo'lgan)",
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "example": 3
                                    },
                                    "scores": {
                                        "description": "Ixtiyoriy. O'zgartirilayotgan ballar ro'yxati.",
                                        "type": "array",
                                        "items": {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "criteria_id": {
                                                    "description": "Asosiy criteria ID (yo'nalish mezoni IDsi)",
                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                    "example": 12
                                                },
                                                "point": {
                                                    "description": "Yangi ball",
                                                    "type": "number",
                                                    "format": "float",
                                                    "example": 10
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Kategoriya muvaffaqiyatli tasdiqlandi",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "properties": {
                                        "success": {
                                            "type": "boolean",
                                            "example": true
                                        },
                                        "approved_count": {
                                            "description": "Tasdiqlangan mezonlar soni",
                                            "type": "integer",
                                            "example": 3
                                        },
                                        "total_point": {
                                            "description": "Yangilangan jami ball",
                                            "type": "number",
                                            "example": 25.5
                                        }
                                    },
                                    "type": "object"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                    "404": {
                        "description": "Ariza yoki kategoriya topilmadi"
                    },
                    "403": {
                        "description": "Ushbu talabaga ruxsat yo'q"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/application-reject": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Arizani rad etish (izoh majburiy)",
                "operationId": "02ed1a10514546502eb64c684fe9c17d",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "id": {
                                        "description": "Ariza ID",
                                        "type": "integer"
                                    },
                                    "comment": {
                                        "description": "Rad etish sababi (majburiy)",
                                        "type": "string"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success"
                    },
                    "400": {
                        "description": "Fail"
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/v1/tutor/social-activity/direction-reject": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Ariza yo'nalishini rad etish (izoh majburiy)",
                "operationId": "db54dae367d457f8ad44d7edf2ea0ec5",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "application_id": {
                                        "description": "Ariza ID",
                                        "type": "integer"
                                    },
                                    "direction_id": {
                                        "description": "Yo'nalish ID",
                                        "type": "integer"
                                    },
                                    "comment": {
                                        "description": "Rad etish sababi (majburiy)",
                                        "type": "string"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success"
                    },

                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
