        "/ver1/tutor/statistics/monitoring": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutorning barcha jamlanma tashxil (monitoring) statistikalari",
                "description": "Tyutor uchun barcha turdagi jamlanma statistikalarni ('students', 'attendance', 'academic_performance', 'social_protection', 'contract_payment' va h.k) yagona obyekt ko'rinishida qaytaradi. Ma'lumotlar fonga ishlaydigan tayyor (keshlangan) statistikadan olinadi.",
                "operationId": "8c7b688b45d99e36d3a4d210394d327b",
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "students": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "attendance": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "academic_performance": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "social_protection": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "contract_payment": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "home_visit": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "student_status": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "system_task": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/statistics/rating": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutorning shaxsiy foydalanish reytingi",
                "description": "Joriy tyutorning tizimdan foydalanish reytingini hisoblaydi.\\n\\nReyting 5 ta komponent asosida 0-100 oraliqda hisoblanadi:\\n- **Tashrif faolligi (30%)** — talabalarni ziyorat qilish faolligi\\n- **Vazifalar bajarilishi (25%)** — vazifalar yaratish va bajarish\\n- **Talabalar qamrovi (20%)** — talabalar bilan ishlash to'liqligi\\n- **Tizimga kirish (15%)** — API orqali login faolligi\\n- **Muntazamlik (10%)** — oy davomida barqaror foydalanish",
                "operationId": "5ee8bdf3791ad3e46728f9381adcf1b2",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili (ixtiyoriy)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2025"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Boshlanish sanasi (ixtiyoriy, default: joriy yil boshi)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2025-01-01"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Tugash sanasi (ixtiyoriy, default: bugun)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2026-02-12"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "tutor_id": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 42
                                                        },
                                                        "tutor_name": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Aliyev Vali"
                                                        },
                                                        "overall_score": {
                                                            "type": "number",
                                                            "format": "float",
                                                            "example": 78.5
                                                        },
                                                        "max_score": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 100
                                                        },
                                                        "rank": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "level": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "good"
                                                                },
                                                                "label": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Yaxshi"
                                                                },
                                                                "color": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "#3b82f6"
                                                                },
                                                                "description": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Tyutor tizimdan yaxshi foydalanmoqda"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "components": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "visit": {
                                                                    "properties": {
                                                                        "score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 85
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weight": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 0.3
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weighted_score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 25.5
                                                                        },
                                                                        "label": {
                                                                            "type": "string",
                                                                            "example": "Tashrif faolligi"
                                                                        }
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": "object"
                                                                },
                                                                "task": {
                                                                    "properties": {
                                                                        "score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 70
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weight": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 0.25
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weighted_score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 17.5
                                                                        },
                                                                        "label": {
                                                                            "type": "string",
                                                                            "example": "Vazifalar bajarilishi"
                                                                        }
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": "object"
                                                                },
                                                                "coverage": {
                                                                    "properties": {
                                                                        "score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 90
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weight": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 0.2
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weighted_score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 18
                                                                        },
                                                                        "label": {
                                                                            "type": "string",
                                                                            "example": "Talabalar qamrovi"
                                                                        }
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": "object"
                                                                },
                                                                "login": {
                                                                    "properties": {
                                                                        "score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 80
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weight": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 0.15
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weighted_score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 12
                                                                        },
                                                                        "label": {
                                                                            "type": "string",
                                                                            "example": "Tizimga kirish faolligi"
                                                                        }
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": "object"
                                                                },
                                                                "consistency": {
                                                                    "properties": {
                                                                        "score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 55
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weight": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 0.1
                                                                        },
                                                                        "weighted_score": {
                                                                            "type": "number",
                                                                            "format": "float",
                                                                            "example": 5.5
                                                                        },
                                                                        "label": {
                                                                            "type": "string",
                                                                            "example": "Muntazamlik"
                                                                        }
                                                                    },
                                                                    "type": "object"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/statistics/leaderboard": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Barcha tyutorlar foydalanish reytingi (leaderboard)",
                "description": "Barcha tyutorlarning tizimdan foydalanish reytingini tartiblangan ro'yxat (leaderboard) shaklida qaytaradi. Joriy tyutorning pozitsiyasi alohida ko'rsatiladi.",
                "operationId": "9ea680831a2c3b796a34cd4b2526a521",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili (ixtiyoriy)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2025"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Boshlanish sanasi (ixtiyoriy, default: joriy yil boshi)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2025-01-01"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Tugash sanasi (ixtiyoriy, default: bugun)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2026-02-12"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifadagi elementlar soni",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "current_tutor_position": {
                                                            "description": "Joriy tyutorning pozitsiyasi",
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 5
                                                        },
                                                        "total_tutors": {
                                                            "type": "integer",
                                                            "example": 42
                                                        },
                                                        "leaderboard": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "position": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1
                                                                    },
                                                                    "tutor_id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 42
                                                                    },
                                                                    "tutor_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Aliyev Vali"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "image": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "groups_count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 3
                                                                    },
                                                                    "students_count": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 75
                                                                    },
                                                                    "overall_score": {
                                                                        "type": "number",
                                                                        "format": "float",
                                                                        "example": 78.5
                                                                    },
                                                                    "rank": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "level": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "good"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "label": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Yaxshi"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "color": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "#3b82f6"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "scores": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "visit": {
                                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                                "format": "float",
                                                                                "example": 85
                                                                            },
                                                                            "task": {
                                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                                "format": "float",
                                                                                "example": 70
                                                                            },
                                                                            "coverage": {
                                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                                "format": "float",
                                                                                "example": 90
                                                                            },
                                                                            "login": {
                                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                                "format": "float",
                                                                                "example": 80
                                                                            },
                                                                            "consistency": {
                                                                                "type": "number",
                                                                                "format": "float",
                                                                                "example": 55
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/statistics/leaderboard-export": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutorlar reytingini Excel formatda yuklab olish",
                "description": "Barcha tyutorlarning tizimdan foydalanish reytingini Excel (.xlsx) formatda yuklab olish.",
                "operationId": "792e5cd3a24ade499a2bfe7f74a58954",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "education_year",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "O'quv yili (ixtiyoriy)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "2025"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_from",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Boshlanish sanasi (ixtiyoriy, default: joriy yil boshi)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2025-01-01"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_to",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Tugash sanasi (ixtiyoriy, default: bugun)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2026-02-12"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Excel file",
                        "content": {
                            "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "type": "string",
                                    "format": "binary"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/student/view": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba anketasi",
                "operationId": "475befb8f58552c38fee17cb12187bd3",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ID",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 5021
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "student": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "id": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 5021
                                                                },
                                                                "first_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Abdulla"
                                                                },
                                                                "second_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Qodirov"
                                                                },
                                                                "third_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Akmal o'g'li",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "full_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Qodirov Abdulla Akmal o'g'li"
                                                                },
                                                                "student_id_number": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "20210001"
                                                                },
                                                                "passport_number": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "AB1234567"
                                                                },
                                                                "passport_pin": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "12345678901234"
                                                                },
                                                                "birth_date": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "2003-02-11"
                                                                },
                                                                "gender": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "image": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998901112233"
                                                                },
                                                                "email": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "student@example.com"
                                                                },
                                                                "home_address": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Toshkent, Chilonzor"
                                                                },
                                                                "_country": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "UZ"
                                                                },
                                                                "country": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_province": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1727"
                                                                },
                                                                "province": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_district": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1727256"
                                                                },
                                                                "district": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_terrain": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 10426
                                                                },
                                                                "terrain": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_current_province": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1735"
                                                                },
                                                                "current_province": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_current_district": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1735211"
                                                                },
                                                                "current_district": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_current_terrain": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 10413
                                                                },
                                                                "current_terrain": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "current_address": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Yotoqxona 2-blok, 75-xona"
                                                                },
                                                                "roommate_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 4
                                                                },
                                                                "_student_roommate_type": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 11
                                                                },
                                                                "student_roommate_type": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_student_living_status": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 11
                                                                },
                                                                "student_living_status": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "parent_phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998901112267"
                                                                },
                                                                "person_phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998931234569"
                                                                },
                                                                "geo_location": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "41.3111,59.2797"
                                                                },
                                                                "_social_category": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "social_category": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "_accommodation": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "accommodation": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        },
                                                        "meta": {
                                                            "properties": {

                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 80125
                                                                },
                                                                "group": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },

                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "specialty": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true

                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },

                                                                    "example": "2024-2025"
                                                                },
                                                                "education_type": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "education_form": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "payment_form": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "student_status": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "level": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                },
                                                                "semester": {
                                                                    "type": "object",
                                                                    "nullable": true
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },

                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]

                            }

                "security": [

        "/ver1/tutor/student/update": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba ma'lumotlarini yangilash",
                "operationId": "2b4143068d3ee1b551ad8e3287213e15",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ID",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 5021
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "phone": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "+998901112233"
                                    },
                                    "email": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "student@example.com"
                                    },
                                    "home_address": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Toshkent shahri, Chilonzor tumani"
                                    },
                                    "_country": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "UZ"
                                    },
                                    "_province": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "1708"
                                    },
                                    "_district": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "170823"
                                    },
                                    "_terrain": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Qishloq"
                                    },
                                    "_current_province": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "2706"
                                    },
                                    "_current_district": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "270601"
                                    },
                                    "_current_terrain": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Shahar"
                                    },
                                    "current_address": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Yotoqxona 2-blok, 45-xona"
                                    },
                                    "roommate_count": {
                                        "type": "integer",
                                        "example": 3
                                    },
                                    "_student_roommate_type": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "WITH_FAMILY"
                                    },
                                    "_student_living_status": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "DORMITORY"
                                    },
                                    "parent_phone": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "+998901112266"
                                    },
                                    "person_phone": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "+998931234567"
                                    },
                                    "geo_location": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "41.3111,69.2797"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": true
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Talaba ma'lumotlari muvaffaqiyatli yangilandi"
                                                        },
                                                        "student": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "id": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 5021
                                                                },
                                                                "full_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                },
                                                                "phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998901112233"
                                                                },
                                                                "email": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "student@example.com"
                                                                },
                                                                "parent_phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998901112266"
                                                                },
                                                                "person_phone": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "+998931234567"
                                                                },

                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "UZ"

                                                                    "example": "1708"
                                                                },
                                                                "_district": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "170823"
                                                                },

                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Qishloq"
                                                                },

                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "2706"
                                                                },

                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "270601"
                                                                },

                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Shahar"
                                                                },
                                                                "current_address": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Yotoqxona 2-blok, 45-xona"
                                                                },
                                                                "home_address": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Toshkent shahri, Chilonzor tumani"
                                                                },
                                                                "geo_location": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "41.3111,69.2797"
                                                                },
                                                                "roommate_count": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 3
                                                                },
                                                                "_student_roommate_type": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "WITH_FAMILY"
                                                                },
                                                                "_student_living_status": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "DORMITORY"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },

                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20-11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "department": {

                                                                        "type": "string",

                                                                        "example": "Kunduzgi"
                                                                    },

                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "3-kurs"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "semester": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "5-semestr"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "active": {
                                                                        "type": "boolean",
                                                                        "example": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "created_at": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2023-09-01 08:00:00"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }

                    },

                        "name": "pinfl",
                        "in": "query",

                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "12345678901234"

                    },

                        "name": "level",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim bosqichi kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "11"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "group",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "specialty",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Mutaxassislik ID",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 12
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "student_status",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba statusi kodi",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "10"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",

                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1

                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Har sahifada nechta",

                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",

                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Abdulla Qodirov"
                                                                    },

                                                                        "example": "Abdulla"

                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "20210001"
                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "12345678901234"
                                                                    },

                                                                        "type": "string",

                                                                        "nullable": true

                                                                        "example": "+998901112233"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "email": {

                                                                        "example": "student@example.com"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "department": {
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "specialty": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "code": {
                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "level": {
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "code": {
                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "student_status": {

                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_year": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-2025"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_type": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Bakalavr"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "education_form": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Kunduzgi"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "payment_form": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "To'lov"

                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"

                                                                    "example": 100
                                                                },
                                                                "total_pages": {

                                                                    "example": 5
                                                                }
                                                            },
