                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }

                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }

        "/ver1/tutor/student/visit-list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutor talabalari ro'yxati (tashrif ma'lumotlari bilan)",
                "operationId": "97652403c6035fe51ade80f05654a9fd",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "group_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Guruh ID (ixtiyoriy, ko'rsatilmasa barcha guruhlar)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 36
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "student_id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ID bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 5021
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Har sahifada nechta",
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 20
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "search",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ism-familiyasi bo'yicha qidiruv",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "Abdulla"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_student_living_status",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Yashash joyi statusi kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "11"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_current_district",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Joriy tuman kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "1735211"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_accommodation",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Yashash joyi turi kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "11"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_level",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Kurs (level) kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "11"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_semestr",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Semestr kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "13"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_form",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim shakli kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "11"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "_education_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Ta'lim turi kodi bo'yicha filtrlash",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "11"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "expand",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qo'shimcha ma'lumotlarni kengaytirish (vergul bilan ajratilgan)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "tutorVisits,group,currentProvince,currentDistrict,currentTerrain,studentLivingStatus,accommodation"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "fields",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qaytariladigan fieldlar (vergul bilan ajratilgan)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "example": "id,first_name,second_name,third_name,group.name,_student_living_status,_current_province,_accommodation"
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "items": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 5021
                                                                    },
                                                                    "first_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "ABDULLA"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "second_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "QODIROV"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "third_name": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "AKMAL O'G'LI"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "_student_living_status": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "_current_province": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "1735"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "_accommodation": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "11"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "group": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=group bo'lganda",
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "id": {
                                                                                "type": "integer",
                                                                                "example": 36
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "20-11"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "currentProvince": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=currentProvince bo'lganda",
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "code": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "1735"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Toshkent shahri"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "currentDistrict": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=currentDistrict bo'lganda",
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "currentTerrain": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=currentTerrain bo'lganda",
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "studentLivingStatus": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=studentLivingStatus bo'lganda",
                                                                        "properties": {
                                                                            "code": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "11"
                                                                            },
                                                                            "name": {
                                                                                "type": "string",
                                                                                "example": "Yotoqxonada"
                                                                            }
                                                                        },
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "accommodation": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=accommodation bo'lganda",
                                                                        "type": "object",
                                                                        "nullable": true
                                                                    },
                                                                    "tutorVisits": {
                                                                        "description": "Faqat expand=tutorVisits bo'lganda",
                                                                        "type": "array",
                                                                        "items": {
                                                                            "properties": {
                                                                                "id": {
                                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                                },
                                                                                "_student": {
                                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                                    "example": 5021
                                                                                },
                                                                                "current_address": {
                                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                                    "example": "Yotoqxona 2-blok"
                                                                                },
                                                                                "geolocation": {
                                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                                    "example": "41.3111,69.2797"
                                                                                },
                                                                                "comment": {
                                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                                    "example": "Tashrif qilindi"
                                                                                },
                                                                                "created_at": {
                                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                                    "example": "2024-11-21 10:30:00"
                                                                                }
                                                                            },
                                                                            "type": "object"
                                                                        }
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "_meta": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "currentPage": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "perPage": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 20
                                                                },
                                                                "totalCount": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 45
                                                                },
                                                                "pageCount": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 3
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/student/visit-create": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Talaba tashrifini qayd etish",
                "operationId": "df15456cf5e3d81d5bf2dbd276658024",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "id",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Talaba ID",
                        "required": true,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "example": 5021
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "_student_living_status": {
                                        "description": "Yashash joyi statusi kodi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "11"
                                    },
                                    "_accommodation": {
                                        "description": "Yashash joyi turi kodi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "11"
                                    },
                                    "_current_province": {
                                        "description": "Viloyat kodi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "1735"
                                    },
                                    "_current_district": {
                                        "description": "Tuman kodi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "1735211"
                                    },
                                    "_current_terrain": {
                                        "description": "Mahalla kodi",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "10413"
                                    },
                                    "current_address": {
                                        "description": "Joriy manzil",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Yotoqxona 2-blok, 75-xona"
                                    },
                                    "geolocation": {
                                        "description": "Geolokatsiya (latitude,longitude)",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "41.3111,69.2797"
                                    },
                                    "comment": {
                                        "description": "Izoh",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Talaba bilan suhbat o'tkazildi, yashash sharoiti yaxshi"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": true
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Tashrif ma'lumotlari muvaffaqiyatli saqlandi"
                                                        },
                                                        "visit": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "id": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 1
                                                                },
                                                                "_student": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 5021
                                                                },
                                                                "student_full_name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Qodirov Abdulla Akmal o'g'li"
                                                                },
                                                                "_student_living_status": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "11"
                                                                },
                                                                "_accommodation": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "11"
                                                                },
                                                                "_current_province": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1735"
                                                                },
                                                                "_current_district": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1735211"
                                                                },
                                                                "_current_terrain": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "10413"
                                                                },
                                                                "current_address": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Yotoqxona 2-blok, 75-xona"
                                                                },
                                                                "geolocation": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "41.3111,69.2797"
                                                                },
                                                                "comment": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "Talaba bilan suhbat o'tkazildi"
                                                                },
                                                                "created_at": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "2024-11-21 10:30:00"
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        "/ver1/tutor/task/list": {
            "get": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Tyutor vazifalari ro'yxati",
                "operationId": "2394e5b37116891294d14577a5d9b45d",
                "parameters": [
                    {
                        "name": "status",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Vazifa statusi (pending, in_progress, completed, rejected)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "from_date",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Boshlanish sanasi (YYYY-MM-DD formatda)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2024-01-01"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "to_date",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Tugash sanasi (YYYY-MM-DD formatda)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "format": "date",
                            "example": "2024-12-31"
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "date_type",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Qaysi sana bo'yicha filter (created_at yoki due_at)",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "string",
                            "default": "created_at",
                            "enum": [
                                "created_at",
                                "due_at"
                            ]
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Sahifa raqami",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 1
                        }
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "per_page",
                        "in": "query",
                        "description": "Har sahifadagi elementlar soni",
                        "required": false,
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "integer",
                            "default": 20
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "tasks": {
                                                            "type": "array",
                                                            "items": {
                                                                "properties": {
                                                                    "id": {
                                                                        "type": "integer",
                                                                        "example": 1
                                                                    },
                                                                    "title": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Haftalik hisobot"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "description": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Talabalar bilan o'tkazilgan uchrashuvlar haqida hisobot"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "status": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "pending"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "status_label": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "Kutilmoqda"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "priority": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "medium"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "due_at": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-12-20 18:00:00"
                                                                    },
                                                                    "has_file": {
                                                                        "type": "boolean",
                                                                        "example": false
                                                                    },
                                                                    "created_at": {
                                                                        "type": "string",
                                                                        "example": "2024-12-18 10:00:00"
                                                                    }
                                                                },
                                                                "type": "object"
                                                            }
                                                        },
                                                        "pagination": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

        "/ver1/tutor/task/create": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Yangi vazifa yaratish",
                "operationId": "1315a25a2a6e16385ca82e58c7f4e767",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "application/json": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "title",
                                    "due_at"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "title": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Haftalik hisobot"
                                    },
                                    "description": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Talabalar bilan o'tkazilgan uchrashuvlar haqida hisobot"
                                    },
                                    "due_at": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "2024-12-25 18:00:00"
                                    },
                                    "priority": {
                                        "description": "low, medium, high",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "medium"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {
                            "application/json": {
                                "schema": {
                                    "allOf": [
                                        {
                                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Response"
                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": true
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Vazifa yaratildi"
                                                        },
                                                        "task": {
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                ],

                "operationId": "7bbf14ea10f508ee930b47c558bc4f79",

                                        "example": "2024-12-25 18:00:00"

                                                        },

                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"

        "/ver1/tutor/task/file-upload": {
            "post": {
                "tags": [
                    "4. Tutor API"
                ],
                "summary": "Vazifa uchun fayl yuklash",
                "operationId": "a435b04c4512df010d11c7e112cfa5bc",
                "requestBody": {
                    "required": true,
                    "content": {
                        "multipart/form-data": {
                            "schema": {
                                "required": [
                                    "file"
                                ],
                                "properties": {
                                    "file": {
                                        "description": "Yuklanadigan fayl (pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx)",
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "format": "binary"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "responses": {
                    "200": {
                        "description": "Success",
                        "content": {

                                        },
                                        {
                                            "properties": {
                                                "result": {
                                                    "properties": {
                                                        "success": {
                                                            "type": "boolean",
                                                            "example": true
                                                        },
                                                        "message": {
                                                            "type": "string",
                                                            "example": "Fayl yuklandi"
                                                        },
                                                        "file": {
                                                            "properties": {
                                                                "name": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "hisobot.pdf"
                                                                },
                                                                "path": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "1/abc123.pdf"
                                                                },
                                                                "base_url": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "https://static.example.com/uploads"
                                                                },
                                                                "type": {
                                                                    "type": "string",
                                                                    "example": "application/pdf"
                                                                },
                                                                "size": {
                                                                    "type": "integer",
                                                                    "example": 102400
                                                                }
                                                            },
                                                            "type": "object"
                                                        }
                                                    },
                                                    "type": "object"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            "type": "object"
                                        }
                                    ]
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                "security": [
                    {
                        "tutorBearerAuth": []
                    }
                ]
            }
        },

                        },
                        "type": "object"
                    }
                ]
            },
            "BadResponse": {
                "allOf": [
                    {
                        "properties": {
                            "success": {
                                "example": false
                            },
                            "error": {
                                "example": "Error description here"
                            },
                            "code": {
                                "example": 400
                            },
                            "data": {
                                "example": null
                            }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                    }
                ]
            },
            "ForbiddenResponse": {
                "allOf": [
                    {
                        "properties": {

                            },

                            },
                            "code": {
                                "example": 401
                            },
                            "data": {
                                "example": null
                            }
                        },
                        "type": "object"
                    }
                ]
            },
            "NotFoundResponse": {
                "allOf": [
                    {
                        "properties": {
                            "success": {
                                "example": false
                            },
                            "error": {
                                "example": "Data not found."
                            },
                            "code": {
                                "example": 404
                            },
                            "data": {
                                "example": null
                            }
                        },

                    }
                ]
            },

                        "type": "string"
                    },
                    "name": {
                        "type": "string"

            "Question": {
                "required": [
                    "question"
                ],
                "properties": {
                    "question": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "maxLength": 4096
                    }
                },
                "type": "object"
            },
            "Token": {

                    "token"
                ],

                },

            },

                "properties": {

                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {

                                {
                                    "type": "integer"
                                }

                    },

                        "type": "string"
                    },

                        "type": "string"
                    }
                },
                "type": "object"
            },

                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {}
                    }
                },
                "type": "object"
            },

            "TutorAuthRequest": {
                "properties": {
                    "login": {
                        "description": "Authentication controller for Tutor API",
                        "format": "string",
                        "example": "tutor_login"
                    },
                    "password": {
                        "format": "string",
                        "example": "password123"
                    },
                    "reCaptcha": {
                        "format": "string",
                        "example": "03AF6jDq15..."
                    }
                },
                "type": "object"
            },
            "Tutor": {
                "description": "Class Tutor\nIdentity model for Tutor API authentication",
                "properties": {
                    "id": {
                        "type": "integer"
                    },
                    "full_name": {
                        "type": "string"
                    },
                    "login": {
                        "type": "string"
                    },
                    "email": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "nullable": true
                    },
                    "telephone": {
                        "type": "string",
                        "nullable": true
                    },
                    "image": {
                        "type": "string"
                    },
                    "university": {
                        "type": "string"
                    },
                    "university_region": {
                        "properties": {
                            "code": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "example": "1726"
                            },
                            "name": {
                                "type": "string",
                                "example": "Toshkent shahri"
                            },
                            "province": {
                                "properties": {
                                    "code": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "1726"
                                    },
                                    "name": {
                                        "type": "string",
                                        "example": "Toshkent shahri"
                                    }
                                },
                                "type": "object",
                                "nullable": true
                            }
                        },
                        "type": "object",
                        "nullable": true
                    },
                    "employee": {
                        "type": "object|null",
                        "nullable": true
                    },
                    "groups": {
                        "type": "array",
                        "items": {
                            "type": "object"
                        }
                    }
                },
                "type": "object"
            }
        },
        "responses": {
            "200": {
                "description": "Successful Response",
                "content": {
                    "application/json": {
                        "schema": {
                            "type": "object"
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            "422": {
                "description": "Validation Error",
                "content": {
                    "application/json": {
                        "schema": {
                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "parameters": {
            "token": {
                "name": "token",
                "in": "query",
                "description": "POST /student-attendance-summary",
                "required": true,
                "schema": {
                    "type": "string"
                }
            }
        },
        "requestBodies": {
            "QuestionBody": {
                "required": true,
                "content": {
                    "application/json": {
                        "schema": {
                            "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Question"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        "securitySchemes": {
            "bearerAuth": {
                "type": "http",
                "name": "Authorization",
                "in": "header",
                "scheme": "bearer"
            },
            "tutorBearerAuth": {
                "type": "http",
                "name": "Authorization",
                "in": "header",
                "scheme": "bearer"
            }
        }
    },
    "tags": [
        {
            "name": "3. Student API",
            "description": "Talaba kabineti integratsiyasi uchun API"
        },
        {
            "name": "5. Fast API",
            "description": "Fast API tizimi dokumentatsiyasi"
        },
        {
            "name": "1. Backend API",
            "description": "Tizim ma'lumotlar bazasidagi ayrim ma'lumotlar uchun API"
        },
        {
            "name": "2. Public API",
            "description": "Ochiq ma'lumotlar uchun API"
        },
        {
            "name": "4. Tutor API",
            "description": "Tyutor kabineti uchun jadval, kontrakt, davomat va talaba ma'lumotlarini qaytaruvchi himoyalangan metodlar."
        },
        {
            "name": "Stat",
            "description": "Stat"
        }
    ]
